description:
You are an artifact‐repository manager who wants to curate binary packages in a fully isolated Python workspace.  
Create a brand-new virtual environment named “venv-curator” directly inside the directory  
/home/user/artifact-curator  

Explicit requirements that the automated checker will verify:  
1. The directory /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator must be created.  
2. After the environment is created, the file /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/pyvenv.cfg must exist.  
3. The Python interpreter for the virtual environment must be located at  
   /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python and must be executable.  
4. When the command  
   /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python --version  
   is executed, it should return a line that starts with the literal text “Python ” followed by the interpreter’s version (e.g., “Python 3.10.12”).  

Output format to display in the terminal (the grader will look for it exactly):  
After creating the virtual environment, echo the absolute path of the newly created interpreter to STDOUT, on its own single line with no extra text.  
Required single-line output example (do not add anything before or after):  
/home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python

Only one terminal command (it can be a compound command chained with && or similar) should accomplish all the above steps and then print that single line.
truth:
Expected post-task state:

1. Directory tree:
   /home/user/artifact-curator/
       venv-curator/
           bin/
               activate
               python          (must exist and be executable)
           include/
           lib/
           pyvenv.cfg

2. The file /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/pyvenv.cfg exists (content auto-generated by venv; checker only confirms existence).

3. The checker will execute:
   test -x /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python
   and will also run:
   /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python --version
   expecting stdout that matches regex:
   ^Python[ ]+([0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+)

4. The agent must have printed to STDOUT exactly:
   /home/user/artifact-curator/venv-curator/bin/python
   with no surrounding whitespace or extra characters.

No additional files or directories should be created by the agent.
